title: Missing 'lines' param redirects even for non-browser clients
body: RendererController::setHeaders() calls redirectToDemo() (a Location header + exit()) whenever the 'lines' query param is missing, but README embed examples for tools that fetch the SVG directly (not a browser) just get a 302 with no SVG body and no explanation. Could this return a proper error SVG or JSON message instead of always redirecting?

title: GoogleFontConverter fetches font URLs from Google's CSS with no host allowlist
body: encodeFonts() regex-extracts URLs from the Google Fonts CSS response and then curlGetContents() fetches each one with CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION enabled and no check that the URL actually points at fonts.gstatic.com. If the upstream CSS response were ever manipulated (e.g. cache poisoning, MITM) this would blindly follow redirects and embed arbitrary fetched content as a data URI in the served SVG.

title: Daily cache expiry can be almost immediate depending on request time
body: setCacheRefreshDaily() always sets Expires to today's 23:59:00 GMT regardless of when the request came in. A request made at 23:58 GMT gets cached for one minute instead of a full day, which seems like an off-by-design bug rather than intentional 'daily at midnight' behavior.

title: RendererModel $DEFAULTS has no default for letterSpacing/template
body: Looking at RendererModel's $DEFAULTS array, most rendering options (font, color, size, duration, etc.) have a default, but letterSpacing and template don't appear in the same list, leading to inconsistent SVG output when those query params are simply omitted instead of falling back cleanly.
